response.overview: A man in Appalachia emerges from the Ohio River in Huntington, WV, and mysteriously finds a ticket in his pocket to attend a premiere of "Happy 90th Birthday." at a local movie theater. The man encounters a strange attendant while viewing the film in an empty theater. As the movie begins, the man sees himself on the screen in a series of music videos by the musical duo, Here KeKe. Ambiguity abounds through the dreamlike worlds encountered in a journey through the man's inner-self, across time and space.
response.tagline: An album by Here KeKe, a Film by Parry Casto & Brett Doeffinger
response.title: Happy 90th Birthday.
